metadata.author: mengyouping
metadata.tagline: 在雨夜与钟摆之间梳理线索。
metadata.description: 以午夜城市、钟表刻度、线索网络与光学几何构成的原创侦探叙事主题。
metadata.originality: 所有图形、配色、CSS 与文档均为本仓库原创，不含第三方角色、Logo、截图、台词、音乐或官方界面。
forbiddenElements: 第三方角色与角色剪影
第三方 Logo 与商标图形
官方 UI、地图、单位图标与字体复刻

assets.heroSvg: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 1600 1000"><defs><linearGradient id="bg" x2="1" y2="1"><stop stop-color="#08111F"/><stop offset=".55" stop-color="#101D2E"/><stop offset="1" stop-color="#17283C"/></linearGradient><radialGradient id="halo"><stop stop-color="#7096BF" stop-opacity=".35"/><stop offset="1" stop-color="#08111F" stop-opacity="0"/></radialGradient><pattern id="grid" width="48" height="48" patternUnits="userSpaceOnUse"><path d="M48 0H0V48" fill="none" stroke="#31445A" opacity=".18"/></pattern></defs><rect width="1600" height="1000" fill="url(#bg)"/><circle cx="1190" cy="450" r="540" fill="url(#halo)"/><rect width="1600" height="1000" fill="url(#grid)"/><g transform="translate(1180 455)" fill="none" stroke="#C9A86A" opacity=".65"><circle r="270" stroke-width="3"/><circle r="210" stroke-width="1"/><path d="M0-270V-230M0 270V230M-270 0H-230M270 0H230" stroke-width="8"/><path d="M0 0L-95-150M0 0L128-48" stroke-width="9" stroke-linecap="round"/></g><g stroke="#D74B54" opacity=".45"><path d="M110 790L440 510L720 650L980 330"/><circle cx="440" cy="510" r="10" fill="#D74B54"/><circle cx="720" cy="650" r="10" fill="#D74B54"/></g><g transform="translate(110 140)"><rect width="500" height="7" rx="3" fill="#D74B54"/><rect y="38" width="330" height="3" rx="2" fill="#C9A86A" opacity=".8"/><text y="120" fill="#E7EEF7" font-size="58" font-family="system-ui, sans-serif" font-weight="700">Detective Noir</text><text y="178" fill="#8FA3B8" font-size="26" font-family="system-ui, sans-serif">ORIGINAL TRIBUTE INTERFACE THEME</text></g></svg>
